com.mentor.chs.api.workbook

Interface IXSubAssemblyWorkbookContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseContext, IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXQueryExpressionFactoryProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXSubAssemblyWorkbookContext
extends IXBaseContext, IXQueryExpressionFactoryProvider
    This interface represents a context object that will be passed to providers during the generation of a workbook

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXHarnessDesign getCurrentHarnessDesign()
      Returns the harness design for which this workbook is generated
      int getCurrentOperationIndex()
      Returns the index of the operation for which the provider is being generated.
      IXSBOM getCurrentSBOM()
      Returns the SBOM against which the whole generation process was started
      java.util.Collection<? extends IXSubAssembly> getCurrentSubAssemblies()
      Returns the sub-assemblies for which the workbook page is being generated
      IXWorkbookDesignLog getDesignLog()
      Retrieves design log The returned interface can be used to log error or warning messages.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getOperationNames()
      Returns an ordered list of operations that will be iterated to generate the workbook
      java.awt.Dimension getPreferedSize()
      Returns the area in the page where the generator output will be placed this information is useful for instance when creating images so that the generator can adjust the image resolution as required.
      IXProviderDataFactory getProviderDataFactory()
      Returns a factory that creates data objects to be used by IXWorkbookProvider
      java.io.File getTemporaryDirectory()
      A directory where any temporary files can be produced

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseContext

        createOptionExpressionParser, createOptionExpressionValidator, getDesignComparisonContext, getLibrary, getXHelper

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXLanguageProvider

        getLanguageManager

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPrintServiceProvider

        getPrintServices

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXSymbolLibraryProvider

        getSymbolLibraries

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXQueryExpressionFactoryProvider

        getQueryExpressionFactory

    • Method Detail

      • getCurrentSubAssemblies

        java.util.Collection<? extends IXSubAssembly> getCurrentSubAssemblies()
        Returns the sub-assemblies for which the workbook page is being generated
        Returns:
        the sub-assemblies

      • getCurrentSBOM

        IXSBOM getCurrentSBOM()
        Returns the SBOM against which the whole generation process was started
        Returns:
        A SBOM

      • getTemporaryDirectory

        java.io.File getTemporaryDirectory()
        A directory where any temporary files can be produced
        Returns:
        A file representing a directory which exists and can be written to

      • getCurrentHarnessDesign

        IXHarnessDesign getCurrentHarnessDesign()
        Returns the harness design for which this workbook is generated
        Returns:
        A harness design

      • getPreferedSize

        java.awt.Dimension getPreferedSize()
        Returns the area in the page where the generator output will be placed this information is useful for instance when creating images so that the generator can adjust the image resolution as required. The provider should attempt to use this setting.
        Returns:
        area where generator output will be placed

      • getProviderDataFactory

        IXProviderDataFactory getProviderDataFactory()
        Returns a factory that creates data objects to be used by IXWorkbookProvider
        Returns:
        data object factory

      • getDesignLog

        IXWorkbookDesignLog getDesignLog()
        Retrieves design log The returned interface can be used to log error or warning messages.
        Returns:
        design log

      • getCurrentOperationIndex

        int getCurrentOperationIndex()
        Returns the index of the operation for which the provider is being generated. This index is to be used in conjunction with the list of operation names returned by getOperationNames().
        Returns:
        the index of the current operation

      • getOperationNames

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getOperationNames()
        Returns an ordered list of operations that will be iterated to generate the workbook
        Returns:
        list of operation names
